summary: A modern bedroom presented in generally good decorative order and appears clean overall, with light domestic use evident to some walls, fittings and furnishings. The room is sparsely furnished and tidy, with neutral décor, carpeted flooring and a large window with a roller blind. There are a few visible marks to the walls, some wear/marks to electrical fittings, and a couple of observed blemishes to the mattress and bedside furniture.

items.name: Ceiling
items.description: Smooth white ceiling.

items.name: Walls
items.description: Emulsioned magnolia/white walls.
defects: light scuff/mark mid to low level to wall above skirting, left of radiator in corner (P046)
faint vertical mark eye level to wall adjacent to bedhead (P045)
small brown stain/mark mid level right hand side wall above headboard (P048)
faint scuff marks mid level to wall behind bedhead (P049)
faint marks mid level to wall by doorway (P036)

items.description: White painted skirting boards.
defects: minor marked area low level near radiator corner (P046)
slight scuffing at threshold area near door (P053)

items.description: Light beige fitted carpet.
defects: light tracking/flattening in traffic areas
small dark mark low level near radiator corner (P047)
